items.title: 7-Eleven/Speedway: $0.5 Off Per Gallon On 7th & 11th Each Month Through 7/11/26
items.title_en: 7-Eleven/Speedway: $0.5 Off Per Gallon On 7th & 11th Each Month Through 7/11/26
items.title_zh: 7-Eleven/Speedway：每月第7天與第11天加油每加侖省$0.5，有效期至2026/7/11
items.summary_zh: 在每月第7天和第11天於7-Eleven或Speedway加油，可省每加侖$0.5，有效期至2026年7月11日。
items.title_es: 7-Eleven/Speedway: $0.5 Off Per Gallon On 7th & 11th Each Month Through 7/11/26

items.title: 7-Eleven: Free Small Slurpee For 7-11 Day
items.summary_zh: 在7-Eleven的7-11紀念日，顧客可獲得免費的小杯思樂冰。

items.title: Purchase $5 In Jaritos Soda, Get $25 Fanatics Promo Code (Stack With Paze)
items.title_en: Purchase $5 In Jaritos Soda, Get $25 Fanatics Promo Code (Stack With Paze)
items.title_zh: 購買$5的Jaritos汽水，即可獲得$25的Fanatics促銷碼（可與Paze疊加）
items.summary_zh: 消費者在購買至少$5的Jaritos汽水後，可獲得價值$25的Fanatics促銷碼，優惠可與Paze同時使用。
items.title_es: Purchase $5 In Jaritos Soda, Get $25 Fanatics Promo Code (Stack With Paze)

items.title: [Targeted] AA SimplyMiles: Spend $65 On AT&T Wireless & Earn 2,325 Miles
items.title_en: [Targeted] AA SimplyMiles: Spend $65 On AT&T Wireless & Earn 2,325 Miles
items.title_zh: 【限定】AA SimplyMiles：於AT&T Wireless消費$65可獲得2,325里程
items.summary_zh: 透過AA SimplyMiles，在AT&T Wireless消費滿$65即可獲得2,325里程獎勵。
items.title_es: [Targeted] AA SimplyMiles: Spend $65 On AT&T Wireless & Earn 2,325 Miles

items.title: Polymarket Promo Codes: (Deposit $90, Get $270)
items.summary_zh: 使用Polymarket的促銷碼，存入$90可獲得$270的獎金。

items.title: [CT, D.C., DE, FL, MA, MD, MI, NH, NJ, NY, OH, PA, RI, VT, VA] Citizens Bank $400/$500 Checking Bonus
items.title_en: [CT, D.C., DE, FL, MA, MD, MI, NH, NJ, NY, OH, PA, RI, VT, VA] Citizens Bank $400/$500 Checking Bonus
items.title_zh: 【多州】Citizens Bank 支票帳戶獎金$400/$500
items.summary_zh: 在指定州（康涅狄格、華盛頓特區、特拉華、佛羅里達等）新開Citizens Bank支票帳戶，可獲得$400或$500的獎金。
items.title_es: [CT, D.C., DE, FL, MA, MD, MI, NH, NJ, NY, OH, PA, RI, VT, VA] Citizens Bank $400/$500 Checking Bonus

items.title: Stop&Shop/Giant: Get 10x Points Home Depot & Lululemon Giftcards (7/10-7/16)
items.title_en: Stop&Shop/Giant: Get 10x Points Home Depot & Lululemon Giftcards (7/10-7/16)
items.title_zh: Stop&Shop/Giant：於Home Depot與Lululemon禮品卡消費可獲得10倍積分（7/10-7/16）
items.summary_zh: 在7月10日至16日期間，於Stop&Shop或Giant購買Home Depot或Lululemon禮品卡，可獲得10倍積分回饋。
items.title_es: Stop&Shop/Giant: Get 10x Points Home Depot & Lululemon Giftcards (7/10-7/16)

items.title: Chase Offers: Save 10% on Lyft, Up To $10 Back
items.title_en: Chase Offers: Save 10% on Lyft, Up To $10 Back
items.summary_zh: 使用Chase卡在Lyft叫車，可獲得10%的現金回饋，上限$10。
items.title_es: Chase Offers: Save 10% on Lyft, Up To $10 Back

items.title: Comenity Playstation Credit Card Adds PlayStation Plus Premium With $6,000 In Spend
items.title_en: Comenity Playstation Credit Card Adds PlayStation Plus Premium With $6,000 In Spend
items.title_zh: Comenity PlayStation信用卡：消費滿$6,000即享PlayStation Plus Premium
items.summary_zh: 持Comenity PlayStation信用卡在累計消費$6,000後，可獲得PlayStation Plus Premium會籍。
items.title_es: Comenity Playstation Credit Card Adds PlayStation Plus Premium With $6,000 In Spend

items.title: Summer Of DashPass: Pick Worldcup Winner & Share $5 Million In Credits & More Deals
items.title_en: Summer Of DashPass: Pick Worldcup Winner & Share $5 Million In Credits & More Deals
items.title_zh: DashPass夏季活動：猜世界盃冠軍，分享$5百萬積分及更多優惠
items.summary_zh: 參與DashPass夏季活動，預測世界盃冠軍即可分享高達$5百萬的積分，還有其他優惠。
items.title_es: Summer Of DashPass: Pick Worldcup Winner & Share $5 Million In Credits & More Deals

items.title: Two New U.S. Mint Coin Deals Upcoming On July 16th & July 21st
items.title_en: Two New U.S. Mint Coin Deals Upcoming On July 16th & July 21st
items.title_zh: 美國鑄幣局將於7月16日及21日推出兩款新硬幣優惠
items.summary_zh: 美國鑄幣局將於7月16日與21日分別推出兩項新硬幣特惠活動。
items.title_es: Two New U.S. Mint Coin Deals Upcoming On July 16th & July 21st

items.title: New Costco Members Get $50 Costco Shop Card (Code: GOLDEN; valid through 8/2/26)
items.title_en: New Costco Members Get $50 Costco Shop Card (Code: GOLDEN; valid through 8/2/26)
items.title_zh: 新Costco會員可獲得$50 Costco禮物卡（代碼：GOLDEN，有效期至2026/8/2）
items.summary_zh: 新加入Costco的會員在輸入GOLDEN優惠碼後，可獲$50的Costco禮物卡，有效期至2026年8月2日。
items.title_es: New Costco Members Get $50 Costco Shop Card (Code: GOLDEN; valid through 8/2/26)

items.title: Rakuten $50/5,000 Referral Bonus – Highest Ever
items.title_zh: Rakuten推薦獎金：每推薦一人可得$50（需達5,000美元消費），為史上最高
items.summary_zh: Rakuten推出史上最高的推薦獎金，每成功推薦一位用戶並消費滿$5,000，即可獲得$50獎金。

items.title: Brex $500 Sign Up Bonus
items.summary_zh: 新註冊Brex帳戶的用戶可獲得$500的註冊獎金。

items.title: ‘Trump Accounts’ Are Now Live For Signup (Includes Bonuses For Children)
items.title_en: ‘Trump Accounts’ Are Now Live For Signup (Includes Bonuses For Children)
items.title_zh: 「川普帳戶」已開放註冊（含兒童優惠）
items.summary_zh: 川普帳戶現已上線，註冊即可獲得優惠，並包括針對兒童的獎勵。
items.title_es: ‘Trump Accounts’ Are Now Live For Signup (Includes Bonuses For Children)
